Because when we when I was a I was living in France as a nanny and au pair for a year, and the scenario happened so many times where I was with my friends who were Austrian, German, Australian, Swedish and British, and the group of us girls would go everywhere together. We did so many things. It was wonderful time. And when we met people, they would ask, where are you from? And everyone would say where they were from. And when I said I was from the US, you.
